author: Tester <t@t.com>
body:
Initial child set filed from the 2026-06-24 QA pass.

## Critical (multi-machine blockers — share a root cause)

- eaf0674  fresh-clone-missing-jjf-refs
- 0c0e7d8  pull-exits-1-from-fresh-clone
- 8034dc1  push-exits-1-from-fresh-clone
- 95fb2d6  format-version-unvalidated

These four likely close together once the meta/* handling is
fixed. Recommended order: F-010 first (decide whether
format-version stays), then F-001/F-002/F-003 follow as one
commit.

## High (graph + concurrency)

- 4940d78  prefix-lookup-broken
- 43c7615  dep-cycle-undetected
- c5078e4  comment-retry-policy-too-eager

## Medium (sharp edges)

- 4928ae6  corrupt-ref-silent-drop
- a105e0b  slug-recycle-policy
- c1ffea7  delete-or-abandon-verb

## Docs

- db53a3e  qa-doc-updates

Full QA findings (out-of-tree): scratchpad/qa/findings.md on
the QA session.

author: Tester <t@t.com>
body:
All 11 children closed across two sessions on 2026-06-24/25.

Per-cluster resolution summary:

- **Sync criticals (F-001/F-002/F-003/F-010):** one commit
  (`d4be791e`) — meta/format-version no longer participates
  in the round-trip set; fetch refspec auto-written on init
  + remote add.
- **F-008 (prefix lookup):** filed, implemented (`8179f758`),
  then reverted (`c8e0d896`) on second look — slugs cover the
  short-handle case and prefix matching adds ambiguity surface
  for little gain. Closed as won't-fix; CLAUDE.md docs
  corrected.
- **F-009 (dep cycles):** preflight rejection in
  `Storage::add_dep_edge` (`d32ec955`); `dependency_cycle`
  error carries the offending chain.
- **F-006 (concurrent comments):** bounded geometric backoff
  (`c4995d6c`); 10-way QA repro now 7/10 lands vs ~2 pre-fix.
- **F-011 (corrupt refs):** snapshot cache captures unreadable
  refs; `jjf ls` and `jjf ready` warn on stderr (`90f33c40`).
- **F-012 (slug recycle):** uniqueness across all statuses,
  closed retains slug forever (`3fad70d6`).
- **F-015 (abandon):** new `Status::Abandoned` + `jjf abandon`
  verb (`163f2f3f`).
- **F-docs:** post-QA refresh of CLAUDE.md + quickstart
  (`14025692`); new "Joining an existing project" section.

505 workspace tests green. Live-planner adversarial repros all
pass post-fix.
